name: Jay Inslee
subject: How we build a movement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Together, we have the power to take back our democracy. | Friend -- Recently we learned that the other side is already running print and digital ads in this race, so today I'm asking for $5. | [**CHIP IN $5 »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=ODkyMTk5OAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTIxMzU2NjEyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
---
I get it, $5 might not feel like much compared to the billions that the Koch brothers and their dark money friends are pouring into our political process this year. But if everyone reading this email chips in that amount, we'll have enough to block what the Republican Governors Association and their billionaire buddies could do to our campaign.
Believe me, it could be massive.
But together, we can take on big money politics and win. And we can send a clear message that we believe in a politics of inclusion and hope.
[**I 'm not ready to concede defeat to the Koch brothers, how about you? If you're with me in this fight, I need you to stand with me now.**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=ODkyMTk5OAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTIxMzU2NjEyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
[](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=ODkyMTk5OAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTIxMzU2NjEyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Look, we have a real race ahead of us. That's why _POLITICO_ ranks us as one of the top 10 governors races of 2016. I know we can take on the GOP and win, but only if we're united.
So I need you now -- our critical mid-month deadline is two days away, and we're aiming to raise $20,000 by midnight on Saturday. Reaching this goal will tell us a lot about our power to go head to head against conservative dark money and win.
To do it, I'm counting on you.
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [EXPRESS DONATE $5 »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=ODkyMTk5OAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTIxMzU2NjEyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
---|---
| | [EXPRESS DONATE $10 »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=ODkyMTk5OAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTIxMzU2NjEyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
---|---
| | [EXPRESS DONATE $25 »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=ODkyMTk5OAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTIxMzU2NjEyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
---|---
| | [EXPRESS DONATE $50 »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=ODkyMTk5OAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTIxMzU2NjEyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
---|---
**[Or, donate another amount.](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=ODkyMTk5OAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTIxMzU2NjEyS0&mt=1&rt=0)**
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee
[**CHIP IN »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=ODkyMTk5OAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTIxMzU2NjEyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
---
| | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=ODkyMTk5OAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTIxMzU2NjEyS0&mt=1&rt=0).

Contributions or gifts to Jay Inslee for Washington are not tax deductible.

name: Russ Feingold
subject: A special message for you
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
I put together a special video for supporters like you to celebrate what we've accomplished together. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4280/1c469400/576990c/356293d/3852566702/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/40k-miles?utm_source=ema_2016-05-14_40kmiles_nd&refcode=ema_2016-05-14_40kmiles_nd&utm_campaign=40kmiles&utm_medium=ema") Friend -- This week, our trusty campaign van reached a milestone: 40,000 miles. From Middleton to Marinette, from Green Bay to Bayfield, since launching this campaign, we've crisscrossed the state of Wisconsin many times over. We've traveled to all of Wisconsin's 72 counties -- most of them twice! -- listening to the ideas and concerns of our state's working families. We've talked to seniors, homeowners, students, small business owners, cheesemakers, police officers, teachers -- Wisconsinites of all walks of life. 324 stops. 40,000 miles. **I've put together a special video thanking grassroots supporters like you and celebrating all that we've accomplished together.[Take a minute to watch it, and consider making your first contribution of $5 to our campaign today.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4280/1c469400/576990c/356293d/3852566702/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/40k-miles?utm_source=ema_2016-05-14_40kmiles_nd&refcode=ema_2016-05-14_40kmiles_nd&utm_campaign=40kmiles&utm_medium=ema")** [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4280/1c469400/576990c/356293d/3852566702/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/40k-miles?utm_source=ema_2016-05-14_40kmiles_nd&refcode=ema_2016-05-14_40kmiles_nd&utm_campaign=40kmiles&utm_medium=ema") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4280/1c469400/576990c/356293a/3852566702/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/40k-miles?utm_source=ema_2016-05-14_40kmiles_nd&refcode=ema_2016-05-14_40kmiles_nd&utm_campaign=40kmiles&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")
---
| | [$25 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4280/1c469400/576990c/356293b/3852566702/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/40k-miles?utm_source=ema_2016-05-14_40kmiles_nd&refcode=ema_2016-05-14_40kmiles_nd&utm_campaign=40kmiles&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---
| [$100 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4280/1c469400/576990c/3562938/3852566702/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/40k-miles?utm_source=ema_2016-05-14_40kmiles_nd&refcode=ema_2016-05-14_40kmiles_nd&utm_campaign=40kmiles&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---
| | [Other »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4280/1c469400/576990c/3562939/3852566702/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/40k-miles?utm_source=ema_2016-05-14_40kmiles_nd&refcode=ema_2016-05-14_40kmiles_nd&utm_campaign=40kmiles&utm_medium=ema&express_lane_other")
---
Being on the road and traveling to every corner of Wisconsin is one of my favorite things to do. I believe that if you are to represent the great people of this state, you need to see where they live and work, and listen to them.
You see, this campaign isn't about me, or the number of miles we've logged on our campaign van.
**It's about our shared hopes and dreams for a better, more united Wisconsin and nation.**
We're less than six months away from Election Day, and we have many miles to go and Wisconsinites yet to meet.
**[I put together a special video for supporters like you to celebrate what we've accomplished together -- watch it, then help keep up our momentum by making a contribution of $5 to the campaign today.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4280/1c469400/576990c/356293d/3852566702/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/40k-miles?utm_source=ema_2016-05-14_40kmiles_nd&refcode=ema_2016-05-14_40kmiles_nd&utm_campaign=40kmiles&utm_medium=ema")**
It's going to take all of us working together to get this done, and I'm proud to be fighting with you by my side.
Thanks,
Russ
[CONTRIBUTE »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4280/1c469400/576990c/356293d/3852566702/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/40k-miles?utm_source=ema_2016-05-14_40kmiles_nd&refcode=ema_2016-05-14_40kmiles_nd&utm_campaign=40kmiles&utm_medium=ema")
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to make a contribution to Russ for Wisconsin, [click here.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4280/1c469400/576990c/3562936/3852566702/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-def?utm_source=ema_2016-01-14_fr-footer-contribute&refcode=ema_2016-01-14_fr-footer-contribute&utm_campaign=advocacy-footer-contribute&utm_medium=ema") If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4280/1c469400/576990c/3562937/3852566702/VEsHBA/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/fr-optput"). If you would like to change your email or salutation, [click here](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4280/1c469400/576990c/3562934/3852566702/VEsHBw/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/changeinfo"). [Click here to unsubscribe](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4280/1c469400/576990c/3562935/3852566702/VEsHBg/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/unsubscribe"). Contributions or gifts to Russ for Wisconsin are not tax deductible. | Authorized and paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
---

name: Andrew Whalen, ChrisKoster.com
subject: Hey, what’s your address?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Koster for Missouri, Gary Mallory, Treasurer
body:
We just got a shipment of bumper stickers in the office, but I'll save you a car trip -- all you have to do is tell us your mailing address and we'll send one directly to you.

**_[So, where should we ship your bumper sticker? Let us know before they run out.](https://act.myngp.com/el/4427961575881967616/-8524612005812369408?ms=em15_evergreen_aw_sticker-hot&utm_medium=email&utm_source=koster&utm_campaign=em15_evergreen_aw_sticker-hot&fn=&ln=&refcode=em15_evergreen_aw_sticker-hot)_**

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/4427961575881967616/-8524612005812369408?ms=em15_evergreen_aw_sticker-hot&utm_medium=email&utm_source=koster&utm_campaign=em15_evergreen_aw_sticker-hot&fn=&ln=&refcode=em15_evergreen_aw_sticker-hot)

If you share Chris Koster's vision of a Missouri that's focused on giving all families a fair shot at the American Dream, then you should show off your support with this free sticker.

It looks great on the back of that Made-in-Missouri Ford F-150, but it will also look awesome on your laptop, your water bottle, or any other item you own that will get the attention of fellow Missourians.

**These free stickers are only available for a limited time:**

**_[http://www.ChrisKoster.com/Free-Sticker](https://act.myngp.com/el/4427961575881967616/-8524612005812369408?ms=em15_evergreen_aw_sticker-hot&utm_medium=email&utm_source=koster&utm_campaign=em15_evergreen_aw_sticker-hot&fn=&ln=&refcode=em15_evergreen_aw_sticker-hot)_**

Thanks,

Andrew Whalen
Koster for Missouri

Paid for by Koster for Missouri, Gary Mallory, Treasurer
---
Koster for Missouri
PO Box 1551
Jefferson City MO 65102 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/4427961575881967616/-8596669599850297344).

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: [PETITION] Stop President Obama's deportation raids
body:
#
[**Sign my petition asking President Obama to stop his plans for raids and deportations of hundreds of women and children who fled horrific violence in Latin America.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/immigration-raids-petition?source=em160514-full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/immigration-raids-petition?source=em160514-full")
* * *
Sisters and Brothers -
My father Eli immigrated to America from Poland in 1921 after World War I at the age of 17. He was not a refugee fleeing war, although much of his family later became victims of the Holocaust. He came to America looking to make a better life. He never made a lot of money, but it didn't matter because he was able to start a family and send his two sons to college. That meant the world to him and he loved this country.
While my father came here as an immigrant seeking economic opportunity, many immigrants arrived in our country fleeing war, oppression and violence. This is true today for thousands of women and unaccompanied children who came to our country in the last several years fleeing horrific violence in Latin America.
This week the media reported something that I find not just wrong, but inhumane: **President Obama is currently planning "a month-long series of raids in May and June to deport hundreds of Central American mothers and children"** who came to our country fleeing that same violence.
Sending women and children back into harm's way after they already fled horrendous violence in Central America is painful and inhumane, and must be stopped.
[**Sign my petition asking President Obama to stop these raids and to make sure that families fleeing violence in Central America are protected from deportation.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/immigration-raids-petition?source=em160514-full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/immigration-raids-petition?source=em160514-full")
**[Sign My Petition»](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/immigration-raids-petition?source=em160514-full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/immigration-raids-petition?source=em160514-full")**
Donald Trump has of course called for building a "Great Wall" along the border with Mexico. Hillary Clinton previously said that these same children who fled violence in Latin America "should be sent back" in order to "send a clear message."
I happen to see things differently. I don't believe that the United States should turn away from our historic role as a haven for the oppressed.
I recently met a young Salvadoran woman who came to the United States on her own at the age of 15 to flee gangs trying to recruit her. I've also spoken with many children who have told me with tears streaming down their faces that they live in daily fear that their parents will be taken away.
**The United States of America must continue to be a refuge for the poor, the tired, the oppressed, and certainly for women and children fleeing horrific violence.**
I urge President Obama to use his executive authority to protect families by extending Temporary Protective Status for those who fled from Central America, and I ask you to join me.
[**Add your name to mine to ask President Obama to stop planned raids and deportations of families fleeing violence in Central and Latin America. Together, we can speak up to protect these families.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/immigration-raids-petition?source=em160514-full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/immigration-raids-petition?source=em160514-full")
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets_go_bernie?refcode=em160514-immigration "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets_go_bernie?refcode=em160514-immigration")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Team Maggie
subject: We're happy to have you with us, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd39c/2a380d31/120e8e9e/f893bd/3199124252/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd39c/2a380d31/120e8e9e/f893bd/3199124252/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hi there,
We just wanted to send you a quick note to say welcome!
By joining Maggie's campaign, you're joining a grassroots community ready to elect a leader, a Mom, and a sports fan who will fight for our families and flip the Senate back to Democratic control.
Maggie's race is a top priority for both Democrats and Republicans. And with the stakes this high, it's easy to see why:
* Polls have shown this race as neck-and-neck since Maggie announced her campaign.

* Democrats have a real chance of taking back the Senate in 2016. But if that's going to happen, we HAVE to win in New Hampshire.

* Republicans spent millions of dollars to defeat Maggie _before she even announced her campaign_.

Maggie is facing a tough election, friends. She's up against a sitting Republican who has shown time and time again that she's looking out for Washington special interests, not New Hampshire.
**That's why we need to make sure that Granite Staters and people across the country know what we already know about Maggie: She's the best person to represent New Hampshire in the U.S. Senate.**[Donate $5 or whatever you can right now to help elect her and take back the Senate.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd39c/2a380d31/120e8e9e/f893be/3199124252/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZXdlbGNvbWUyIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=ewelcome2&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")****
Thanks again for joining the campaign. We're excited for all that we'll accomplish together!
-- Team Maggie
[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd39c/2a380d31/120e8e9e/f893be/3199124252/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZXdlbGNvbWUyIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=ewelcome2&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd39c/2a380d31/120e8e9e/f893bf/3199124252/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

clean_body: "" "" Hi there, We just wanted to send you a quick note to say welcome! By joining Maggie's campaign, you're joining a grassroots community ready to elect a leader, a Mom, and a sports fan who will fight for our families and flip the Senate back to Democratic control. Maggie's race is a top priority for both Democrats and Republicans. And with the stakes this high, it's easy to see why: Polls have shown this race as neck-and-neck since Maggie announced her campaign. Democrats have a real chance of taking back the Senate in 2016. But if that's going to happen, we HAVE to win in New Hampshire. Republicans spent millions of dollars to defeat Maggie before she even announced her campaign. Maggie is facing a tough election, friends. She's up against a sitting Republican who has shown time and time again that she's looking out for Washington special interests, not New Hampshire. That's why we need to make sure that Granite Staters and people across the country know what we already know about Maggie: She's the best person to represent New Hampshire in the U.S. Senate. ""** Thanks again for joining the campaign. We're excited for all that we'll accomplish together! -- Team Maggie ""

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: Nuts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
We're running two races here | Friend --

Things are getting nuts around here! We’re opening offices every week in battleground states like Ohio and Florida, AND we’re fighting every day before the California primary, building for rallies in Kentucky, and even doing voter outreach in the U.S. Virgin Islands! (Hillary wasn’t kidding when she said we’re going to fight for every vote.)

Here’s the deal: Bernie’s not opening field offices in Ohio because he’s only focused on the primary. Donald Trump isn’t opening field offices in California because he’s only focused on the general. We’re the only ones running two races, which means we need this team to step up twice as much.

**You know Bernie’s grassroots army and Trump’s billionaire buddies are coming through -- can we count on you? Chip in right now (we’ll send you a free sticker to say thanks!), and let’s win BOTH these fights:**
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjU0OTA4MDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyMjM2MjE5S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Marlon

Marlon Marshall
Director of State and Political Engagement
Hillary for America

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than one million grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjU0OTA4MDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyMjM2MjE5S0&mt=1&rt=0)

---

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.2 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjU0OTA4MDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyMjM2MjE5S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjU0OTA4MDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyMjM2MjE5S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjU0OTA4MDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyMjM2MjE5S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjU0OTA4MDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyMjM2MjE5S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjU0OTA4MDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyMjM2MjE5S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjU0OTA4MDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyMjM2MjE5S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjU0OTA4MDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyMjM2MjE5S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU0OTA4MDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyMjM2MjE5S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjU0OTA4MDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyMjM2MjE5S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjU0OTA4MDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyMjM2MjE5S0&mt=1&rt=0)

body:
We have to go all in NOW.

Friend --

If we want to keep Trump-style politics out of Washington, there’s only one thing to do: Support Jay Inslee today.

We need your help to fight state Republicans -- will you donate today by our critical mid-month deadline at midnight?
